title: Chain 1/8: Conference Registration
scene: 你参加一场国际学术会议，在签到处登记并领取材料。（对话链：学术英语实战，适合第四册学习者）

turns.cn: 早上好，请出示您的确认邮件或二维码。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your confirmation email or QR code?

turns.cn: 当然，我是张伟，注册的是分会场 B。
turns.en: Certainly. I'm Zhang Wei, registered for Session B.

turns.cn: 找到了。需要名牌吗？发音要标拼音还是英文？
turns.en: Found it. Would you like a name badge? Phonetic or English spelling?

turns.cn: 英文拼写就好，谢谢。主旨演讲在哪个厅？
turns.en: English spelling, please. Which hall is the keynote in?

turns.cn: 主会场在三楼，您的分会场在二楼 201。
turns.en: The keynote is on the third floor. Your session is Room 201 on the second floor.

turns.cn: 明白了，谢谢。
turns.en: I see. Thank you very much.

title: Chain 2/8: Question After the Lecture
scene: 主旨演讲结束，你举手向演讲者提问。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 感谢您精彩的演讲。我有一个关于方法论的问题。
turns.en: Thank you for an excellent lecture. I have a question about your methodology.

turns.cn: 请讲。
turns.en: Please go ahead.

turns.cn: 您如何排除样本选择带来的偏差？
turns.en: How did you control for bias in sample selection?

turns.cn: 我们采用了分层随机抽样，并在附录中说明了局限。
turns.en: We used stratified random sampling. The limitations are noted in the appendix.

turns.cn: 这些发现是否可推广到其他文化背景？
turns.en: Are these findings generalisable to other cultural contexts?

turns.cn: 谨慎推广。我们正在跨文化复制研究。
turns.en: Only with caution. We're replicating the study cross-culturally now.

title: Chain 3/8: Meeting Your Supervisor
scene: 你约导师讨论论文初稿的修改意见。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 初稿我读过了。论点清晰，但文献综述偏薄。
turns.en: I've read your draft. The argument is clear, but the literature review is thin.

turns.cn: 我会补充近五年的核心研究，尤其是欧洲那边的成果。
turns.en: I'll add key studies from the past five years, especially from Europe.

turns.cn: 第三章的数据分析需要更严谨。你考虑过替代模型吗？
turns.en: The analysis in Chapter Three needs to be tighter. Have you considered alternative models?

turns.cn: 我打算用稳健性检验比较两种规格。
turns.en: I plan to compare two specifications with robustness checks.

turns.cn: 好。两周后带修订提纲再来。
turns.en: Good. Come back in two weeks with a revised outline.

turns.cn: 谢谢您的指导，我会按时提交。
turns.en: Thank you for your guidance. I'll submit on schedule.

title: Chain 4/8: Seminar Presentation
scene: 研究生研讨会上，你简要汇报研究进展。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 张伟，您有十五分钟，包括提问。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, you have fifteen minutes, including questions.

turns.cn: 谢谢。我今天汇报的主题是媒体对公众舆论的影响。
turns.en: Thank you. Today I'll discuss how the press shapes public opinion.

turns.cn: 首先概述理论框架，然后展示初步数据。
turns.en: I'll outline the theoretical framework first, then present preliminary data.

turns.cn: 请控制时间，十点前留两分钟讨论。
turns.en: Please watch the time. Leave two minutes for discussion before ten.

turns.cn: 好的，我会简明扼要。
turns.en: Certainly. I'll be concise.

turns.cn: 开始吧。
turns.en: Please begin.

title: Chain 5/8: Peer Review Feedback
scene: 同事请你审阅一篇投稿，你给出书面意见后当面讨论。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您读完手稿了吗？审稿意见对我们很有帮助。
turns.en: Have you finished the manuscript? Your review comments were very helpful.

turns.cn: 总体扎实，但结论部分超出了证据支持的范围。
turns.en: Overall it's solid, but the conclusion goes beyond what the evidence supports.

turns.cn: 您建议我们弱化措辞还是补实验？
turns.en: Would you suggest softening the claims or adding experiments?

turns.cn: 两者都做更稳妥：收窄结论，并增加一组对照。
turns.en: Both would be safer: narrow the claims and add a control condition.

turns.cn: 截止日期很紧，您觉得修订需要多久？
turns.en: The deadline is tight. How long do you think revision will take?

turns.cn: 若数据现成，一周可完成主要修改。
turns.en: If the data are ready, the main revisions could be done within a week.

title: Chain 6/8: Library Research Help
scene: 你在大学图书馆请学科馆员帮忙检索数据库。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您好，我在找关于民主制度演变的英文期刊文章。
turns.en: Hello. I'm looking for journal articles on the evolution of democracy.

turns.cn: 您需要同行评审的论文还是也包括专著章节？
turns.en: Do you need peer-reviewed articles only, or book chapters as well?

turns.cn: 主要是近十年内的同行评审论文。
turns.en: Mainly peer-reviewed papers from the last decade.

turns.cn: 可以用 JSTOR 和 Web of Science。需要我演示高级检索吗？
turns.en: Try JSTOR and Web of Science. Shall I show you advanced search?

turns.cn: 麻烦演示一下如何用布尔运算符组合关键词。
turns.en: Could you demonstrate how to combine keywords with Boolean operators?

turns.cn: 当然，请跟我到参考咨询台。
turns.en: Certainly. Please follow me to the reference desk.

title: Chain 7/8: Academic Debate
scene: 课堂上就「技术是否必然造福人类」展开辩论，你陈述反对观点。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 反方两分钟陈述，请张伟开始。
turns.en: Two minutes for the opposition. Zhang Wei, please begin.

turns.cn: 技术本身中立，但利益分配决定它造福谁。
turns.en: Technology is neutral in itself, but who benefits depends on how gains are distributed.

turns.cn: 历史表明，没有监管的创新往往加剧不平等。
turns.en: History shows that innovation without regulation often deepens inequality.

turns.cn: 时间到。正方可以回应了。
turns.en: Time's up. The proposition may respond.

turns.cn: 我稍后会在反驳环节回应监管成本的问题。
turns.en: I'll address the cost of regulation in my rebuttal.

turns.cn: 好的，请坐。
turns.en: Very well. Please be seated.

title: Chain 8/8: Networking at the Reception
scene: 会议茶歇时，你与一位外国学者寒暄并交换研究方向。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您对今天上午的分议题有什么看法？
turns.en: What did you think of this morning's panel?

turns.cn: 很有启发，尤其是关于语言习得的那场。
turns.en: Very stimulating, especially the session on language acquisition.

turns.cn: 我研究二语写作，您呢？
turns.en: I work on second-language writing. And you?

turns.cn: 我关注媒体话语与公众认知，也许有合作空间。
turns.en: I focus on media discourse and public perception. There may be room to collaborate.

turns.cn: 乐意保持联系。这是我的名片。
turns.en: I'd be glad to stay in touch. Here's my card.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我也发您我的邮箱。
turns.en: Thank you. I'll send you my email as well.
